name: Gorge
short_description: Gorge is a first-person puzzle-platformer, where you use telekinesis and wall-running to solve challenging interconnected obstacle courses.
detailed_description:
Gorge is a first-person puzzle-platformer game, where you use your telekinesis abilities on objects in order to create paths you can traverse using your parkour abilities.

Solve your way through the red rock canyons & waterfalls, the debris scattered gorge, a cave system, a reservoir and a crumbling dam.

A free, short game.

Purchase the "Special Features" pack to unlock extra features:
- 7 Challenge Courses
- Achievements
- Appreciation from the solo-developer

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese
